manifest.name: @msgpack/msgpack

scripts.prepare: npm run clean && webpack --bail && tsc --build tsconfig.dist.json tsconfig.dist.es5+esm.json && ts-node tools/esmify.ts dist.es5+esm/*.js dist.es5+esm/*/*.js
scripts.test:cover: npm run cover:clean && npm-run-all 'test:cover:*' && npm run cover:report
scripts.update-dependencies: npx rimraf node_modules/ package-lock.json ; npm install ; npm audit fix --force ; git restore package.json ; npm install
